---
title: "Stats19 A package for working with open road crash data"
description: "Robin Lovelace, Malcolm Morgan, Layik Hama, and Mark Padgham (2019). Stats19 A package for working with open road crash data. *Journal of Open Source Software*. https://doi.org/10.21105/joss.01181"
date: "2019-01-01"
title-block-banner: false
toc: false
citation-key: "lovelace_stats19_2019"
citation-type: "article-journal"
citation-type-label: "Journal Article"
venue: "Journal of Open Source Software"
doi: "10.21105/joss.01181"
publication-url: "http://doi.org/10.21105/joss.01181"
authors:
  - "Robin Lovelace"
  - "Malcolm Morgan"
  - "Layik Hama"
  - "Mark Padgham"
---

**Type:** Journal Article
**Venue:** Journal of Open Source Software
**Year:** 2019

[DOI](https://doi.org/10.21105/joss.01181) [Publisher Link](http://doi.org/10.21105/joss.01181) [BibTeX](entry.bib)

## Citation

Robin Lovelace, Malcolm Morgan, Layik Hama, and Mark Padgham (2019). Stats19 A package for working with open road crash data. *Journal of Open Source Software*. https://doi.org/10.21105/joss.01181

## BibTeX

```bibtex
@article{lovelace_stats19_2019,
  ids = {stats192019},
  title = {Stats19 {{A}} Package for Working with Open Road Crash Data},
  author = {Lovelace, Robin and Morgan, Malcolm and Hama, Layik and Padgham, Mark},
  date = {2019},
  journaltitle = {Journal of Open Source Software},
  volume = {4},
  number = {33},
  pages = {1181},
  publisher = {[object Object]},
  doi = {10.21105/joss.01181},
  url = {http://doi.org/10.21105/joss.01181}
}
```

## Notes

{{< include _notes.qmd >}}
